channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Study finds creatine has benefits beyond muscle growth
item.description: Creatine, often used to enhance athletic performance, may have broader health benefits. The substance naturally supports cellular energy production.

item.title: MIT researchers determine structure of advanced material
item.description: Researchers at MIT have identified the atomic structure of relaxor ferroelectrics, materials used in medical devices and sonar.

item.title: Amino acid supplement shows promise in Alzheimer's research
item.description: A study indicates that arginine, an inexpensive amino acid, may help mitigate damage associated with Alzheimer's disease.

item.title: Plastic waste converted to hydrogen fuel using sunlight
item.description: Researchers have developed a process that uses sunlight to convert plastic waste into clean fuels, such as hydrogen.
